title: Lesson: CBet Flop (IP + OOP) + BB vs CBet OOP
plan: Read PDFs for CBet IP, CBet OOP, and BB vs CBet OOP to extract hand ranges, frequencies, and sizing standards
Add board texture categorization constants and helper method (_categorize_board_texture) to lesson_classifier.py
Add _CBET_IP_RANGES, _CBET_OOP_RANGES, and _BB_VS_CBET_DEFENSE_RANGES hand tier constants to lesson_classifier.py
Implement _eval_cbet_ip() method with texture-based frequency and sizing evaluation
Implement _eval_bb_vs_cbet() method with equity-based response evaluation
Update classify_hand() detection blocks for lessons 13, 14, 18 to use new specific eval methods
Write 30+ comprehensive tests covering all CBet IP, OOP, and BB defense scenarios
